nasb.text: “This is what applies to the Levites: from twenty-five years old and upward they shall enter to perform service in the work of the tent of meeting.

esv.text: “This applies to the Levites: from twenty-five years old and upward they shall come to do duty in the service of the tent of meeting.

cnv.text: “關於利未人的職責是這樣：從二十五歲及以上的，要進來辦理會幕裡的事務；

ccb.text: “二十五岁以上的利未人都要到会幕司职，
